title: LTX 2K/4K tiers
description: Add 2K + 4K quality tiers to LTX video. Extended the quality radio (model-aware tier list, tiersFor), added /64-snapped dims to LTX_RATIOS, wrap radio to 2 rows (scoped flex-wrap on the inner MpiRadioGroup row), status-bar info carries resolution + motion hint, full-width Generate Audio button. SCOPE GREW (user call): qualityTier became PER-MODEL (was shared) — modelSettings[id].qualityTier via new 'perModel' control scope; selectedRatio/orientation stay shared; clampQualityTier maps cross-model carries to 'very_high' (not 'medium'); gen-time controlState snapshots tier under .model; reuse clamps against target; SCHEMA 3->4 migration copies shared tier per-model (clamped per family). Ships via MPI-127. Commits: 9e5322d, ec39133, 75e6de7, 0addae7.
